entry.title: Divide And Bypass: A new Simple Way to Bypass AMSI

link.title: Divide And Bypass: A new Simple Way to Bypass AMSI

entry.summary: This post is about a new simple way to bypass AMSI (Antimalware Scan Interface), that can be applied on small scripts, specially the popular AMSI bypasses. Introduction In the last few years, Powershell become so popular and a great target for hackers, as it provide access to almost all windows’s components, due to its integration with .NET framework, which allows us, Offensive security guys ...
